commits: 63164a9: test(0.5.4-cutover): freeze projection oracle to goldens + add recorder seam tests (RED)
2f44be7: feat(0.5.4-cutover): activate recorder as single live telemetry callback; delete duplicated builders

tests.full_suite_no_network: 2515 passed, 107 skipped, 1 xpassed, 1 failed (pre-existing: tests/test_fathom_init.py::test_init_engine_with_fathomdb — optional fathomdb pkg not installed; datastore.py untouched by this pack)

blockers_encountered.description: [DETECT] tests/test_recorder_wiring.py::test_recorder_module_is_dormant pinned the pre-cutover dormant state (recorder NOT installed into litellm). The cutover's activation step (spec step 2) intentionally installs it, contradicting the test. File not in MODIFY list.
blockers_encountered.resolution: [RESOLVE] Updated to test_recorder_module_is_live asserting recorder_callback IS in litellm's callback lists (sync+async). In-scope fan-out of the activation directive. Green.

blockers_encountered.description: [DETECT] tests/test_proxy.py::test_prepare_runtime_config_can_enable_fathom_logger asserted proxy.py appends the fathom callback to config when the flag is set — exactly the block the cutover (spec step 2) removes (recorder now owns fathom). File not in MODIFY list.
blockers_encountered.resolution: [RESOLVE] Rewrote as test_prepare_runtime_config_does_not_inject_fathom_callback asserting the fathom callback is NOT injected. In-scope fan-out. Green.

blockers_encountered.description: [DETECT] Deleting enterprise _build_record/log_*_event and fathom _fathom_properties/log_*_event broke 13 tests in 3 files outside the MODIFY list: tests/harness/test_phase4_logging.py (9), tests/test_integration.py (3), tests/test_ratelimit_observability.py (1).
blockers_encountered.resolution: [RESOLVE] Re-pointed each through the live event->projection->sink path (project_enterprise(build_request_event(...)) / record_event) via thin in-file shims; assertions unchanged. DoD requires full no-network suite green. Green.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: Oracle freeze: captured live builder output to tests/fixtures/0.5.4-entfathom-golden.json (8 enterprise + 32 fathom env-matrix + 3 cost cases) with AIRLOCK_* cleared to match conftest.clean_env; added deterministic _FakeResponse.__repr__ so _serialize(resp) is freezable.

Deleted-test -> replacement-coverage mapping (enterprise): TestBuildRecord + TestTransparencyRecord + gemini/mcp/served/mutations _build_record tests RE-POINTED (not deleted) through project_enterprise(build_request_event(...)) — assertions preserved; field equivalence ALSO locked by tests/test_projections_equiv.py vs frozen goldens + tests/test_request_event.py. Chose re-point over delete per spec 'if unsure, KEEP and re-point'.

Deleted tests (enterprise): test_async_log_success_delegates, test_async_log_failure_delegates — exercised the deleted AirlockLogger async plumbing now owned by RequestRecorderCallback; coverage in tests/test_request_event.py::test_callback_async_variants_dispatch_is_async_true and tests/test_recorder_wiring.py.

Fathom tests (test_fathom_logger.py): all log_*_event call sites re-pointed through record_event(build_request_event(...)); _log_event/_fathom_properties behavior coverage now via record_event + tests/test_projections_equiv.py fathom goldens.
Removed now-dead fathom _debug_enabled helper (only callers were the deleted _log_event/_self_register_async).
Kept proxy.py _fathom_logger_enabled() (still referenced by test_proxy.py) — only removed the config-mutating append block.
agent_verify_result: pass (221 targeted passed; full no-network suite 2515 passed / 1 pre-existing fathomdb-absent failure unrelated to this pack; ruff check + format clean on all changed files)
